channel.title: MiSTer FPGA Core & Arcade Tracker: All changes
channel.description: New cores/games and shipped updates in the public MiSTer databases, from the daily tracker crawl. Filtered variants: feed-new.xml (new only), feed-updates.xml (updates only).

item.title: [Updated] Apple Lisa (Computer core)
item.description:
1983 / Apple

Updated in the public MiSTer databases on 2026-07-21 (source: distribution_mister).

Commit history

item.title: [New] Tempest (Arcade)
item.description:
Shooter / 1981 / Atari

Core: Tempest

New in the public MiSTer databases on 2026-07-20 (source: distribution_mister).

Commit history
